text:
If you like sunshine, low humidity, and a lake that isn't trying to slap you around, this is your weekend. Today's a lock: sunny, high right around 83, dewpoints in the comfortable 50s, and the lake lying down at 1 foot or less under a light south wind. Water's a swimmable 70, so if you're headed to the waterfront, go for it, any time today works and there's no real cutoff to plan around.

Saturday warms up nicely into the upper 80s with sunshine sticking around, still comfortable on the humidity front. The models are tight on this one, so I'm confident in it. Winds pick up just slightly into the 5 to 15 knot range by Saturday night, still nothing that should keep a paddleboard off the water. Air quality's good both days, no smoke or ozone concerns. Enjoy it, because the forecasters are already flagging unsettled weather moving in next week, and Sunday itself brings a bit more cloud cover with a stray shower possible, so this is the window to get outside.
packet:
OBSERVED (2026-07-24T11:05:00+00:00): Clear, 57F feels 57F, humidity 82%, wind N 0 mph
NWS FORECAST:
  Today: Sunny, with a high near 83. South wind 3 to 8 mph.
  Tonight: Mostly clear, with a low around 61. Southeast wind around 5 mph.
  Saturday: Sunny, with a high near 88. South wind around 8 mph.
  Saturday Night: Partly cloudy, with a low around 65. South wind 6 to 9 mph.
AFD KEY MESSAGES (forecaster's reasoning, issued 2026-07-24T06:23:00+00:00):
  1. Dry and seasonably warm weather will continue into the weekend under high pressure.
  2. Unsettled weather returns next week.
AFD WHAT CHANGED: As of 221 AM EDT Friday... No major changes to the forecast with this update.
LAKE (broad waters):
  Today: South winds 5 to 10 knots. Sunny. Waves 1 foot or less.
  Tonight: South winds 5 to 10 knots. Clear. Waves 1 foot or less.
  Saturday: South winds 5 to 10 knots. Sunny. Waves 1 to 2 feet.
  Saturday Night: South winds 5 to 15 knots. Partly cloudy. Waves 1 foot or less.
LAKE GAGE: water 70F, level 95.71 ft (normal)
MODEL SPREAD (where forecasts diverge):
  2026-07-24: highs [GFS 84, Euro 82, ICON 82] spread 2F; precip chance [GFS 1%, Euro 0%, ICON 0%]
  2026-07-25: highs [GFS 88, Euro 86, ICON 85] spread 3F; precip chance [GFS 1%, Euro 0%, ICON 0%]
  2026-07-26: highs [GFS 85, Euro 86, ICON 86] spread 1F; precip chance [GFS 5%, Euro 4%, ICON 0%]
AIR: AQI 31 Good (OZONE) — Expect generally good air quality across Vermont for Friday, July 24th.
SUN: rise 2026-07-24T05:31-04:00, set 2026-07-24T20:27-04:00, UV max 7.2
WEATHER UNDERGROUND / WEATHER.COM:
  high 84, low 60: A few clouds. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the low 60s.
  high 87, low 64: Mainly sunny. Highs in the upper 80s and lows in the mid 60s.
WCAX METEOROLOGIST: The weekend is not looking too bad either! Sunshine sticks around through the day Saturday. We are a bit warmer as highs for the day head into the mid and upper 80s for Saturday afternoon. Sunday looks to feature a bit more cloud cover than Saturday, and there could be a few spotty showers here and there into Sunday afternoon, but most will likely stay dry. Sunday is a bit cooler by a degree or two as a result of the extra cloud cover and spotty showers. While we are warming up into the weekend, humidity looks to stay largely in check, with dewpoints in the 50s which is comfortable.
